description: Whale Play local status UI asset ids for Agentic Play and MVU variables. Cards should write variables only; Whale Play renders the UI.

assets.label: 生命
assets.schemaShape: { value: number; max: number; label?: string; description?: string }
assets.usage: RPG 战斗、生存、受伤、恢复

assets.label: 魔法
assets.schemaShape: { value: number; max: number; label?: string; description?: string; valueLabel?: string }
assets.usage: 施法、异能、灵力、法术位消耗和恢复

assets.label: 耐力
assets.schemaShape: { value: number; max: number; label?: string; description?: string }
assets.usage: 奔跑、潜行、格斗、持续行动

assets.label: 好感度
assets.usage: 恋爱、搭档、NPC 信任和情感推进

assets.label: 经验
assets.schemaShape: { value: number; max: number; level?: number; label?: string }
assets.usage: 升级、成长、熟练度和任务奖励

assets.label: 理智
assets.schemaShape: { value: number; max: number; label?: string; description?: string }
assets.usage: 恐怖、精神污染、梦境、幻觉或压力

assets.label: 危险
assets.usage: 潜入、追逐、警戒、危机倒计时
